I didn't know it was going to be a big
deal I was just trying to make something
to sound cool you know it's like when

and then it becomes like the biggest hit

horn is not the biggest hit of my career
but so far it's like top
three my name is Cypher sounds hip-hop
DJ from New York City and I popularize
the air horn sound effect into a global
phenomenon
in Jamaica in the late 70s early 80s
they used to have these parties and what
in these clubs which they call dance
halls and in that moment everyone gets
excited they scream they make noises and
they would hit air horns and then it got
to a point where DJ started having
little Samplers and have playing with
themselves dance hall and Hip-Hop are
basically like half Brothers DJs
especially cool herk who's Jamaican move
to to the Bronx and would throw these
parties like he used to throw in Jamaica
that whole scene moved here and that's
what created hip-hop ladies and
gentlemen it is 3:00 in New York City
Yours Truly Cypher sounds DJ up his back
so early 2000s around 20012 2002 I got
my own show on Hot 97 Cipher Saturdays
and I wanted to sound different than all
the other DJs so I would use the air
horn and a couple other Jamaican sound
effects but see it was hard it was hard
to play sound effects like that back in
the day cuz when you did a live in a
club you would hit the air
horn and make these different I guess
like rhythmic variations of how it would
play so we couldn't do that in the
computer so I had to like make my own
version so I would just hit the button
once but it would play like it was live
which is the one that kind of like
exploded I didn't invent the air horn
sound I didn't invent the usage of it in
a party me being on the radio I just
became the guy known for it
